scope: GSC-derived only (Google Search Console + keyword master list), 37 snapshots 2026-05-07 to 2026-06-25. Competitor #1-blocker and AI-visibility sections remain manual and are intentionally not auto-generated here.
wins: Core local money terms held their top tiers: 'bariatric surgery counseling san antonio' #1 (1.0), 'bariatric counseling san antonio' #2, 'weight loss counseling san antonio' #2, 'weight management therapist san antonio' #3 (all delta 0.0 day-over-day).
Best mover with real volume: 'eating disorder counseling san antonio' improved to 14.9 (delta +4.0) on 15 impressions, the strongest gain among terms with non-trivial impressions.
Recovery on rehab terms: 'san antonio bariatric center' +9.8 to 31.1 (11 impr) and 'holistic approach to weight loss' +9.2 to 34.8 (6 impr); 'eating disorder therapist near me' +5.3 to 17.0.

Content engine is the impression driver: the Wegovy/Ozempic/Zepbound medications post pulls 868 impressions at avg pos 10.0, the anxiety-and-depression-related-to-weight post 623 impr @ 14.0, and better-sleep-for-weight-loss 593 impr @ 11.1 — all page-1 or near-page-1.
Highest-impression tracked head term 'bariatric counseling' sits at 12.8 (22 impr), up sharply from a 27.1 mid-month reference.
needs_attention: Keyword coverage (this is a KEYWORD count, not a page count): 24 of 75 tracked keywords show GSC impressions; 51 show none. Many no-impression terms are not-yet-ranking long-tail/telehealth phrases. NOTE: a staging targetUrl is a tracker-hygiene issue, not an unpublished page — most staging-targeted tracker URLs are stale pointers to pages already live on www.

Visibility drift over the snapshot range (2026-05-07 to 2026-06-25): impressions fell from 2,447 to 1,617 and impression-weighted avg position softened from 14.87 to 21.38. Today (21.38) is a one-day uptick from yesterday's 19.86 — mid-June had recovered to ~16.5 before drifting back.
CTR is near zero: 5 clicks on 1,617 impressions today (~0.3%). Lots of page-2/low-page-1 visibility that is not converting to clicks.

Commercial terms that slipped with real impressions: 'weight loss counseling' -28.4 to 68.5 (4 impr), 'registered dietitian san antonio' -15.0 to 33.0 (1 impr), 'eating disorder therapist san antonio' -8.3 to 21.8 (9 impr — real signal), 'bariatric counselor' -6.0 to 9.8 (4 impr), 'bariatric counseling' -2.4 to 12.8 (22 impr).

Caveat: most tracked positions rest on a single impression and swing day to day; treat individual position deltas as directional only. Terms with 9+ impressions (eating disorder therapist san antonio, eating disorder counseling san antonio, bariatric counseling) carry the most reliable signal.
priority_actions: Keyword-tracker hygiene: repoint the 6 staging12.bariatriccounselingcenter.com targetUrls in keywords-master.json (bariatric-counseling-near-me, eating-disorder-therapist-near-me, intuitive-eating-support-in-mcallen-tx, weight-loss-counseling-or-therapy, what-is-a-bariatric-counselor, what-is-a-weight-loss-counselor) to their live www URLs so GSC can match page-level data.

Fix the CTR gap: add clear CTAs and internal links from the three high-impression blog posts (medications 868 impr, anxiety/depression 623 impr, better-sleep 593 impr) into the matching service pages (weight-loss / GLP-1 behavioral support, depression-and-weight, weight-management) to convert near-page-1 impressions into clicks.

On-page refresh for the slipped commercial terms with real impressions — prioritize 'eating disorder therapist san antonio' (-8.3, 9 impr) and 'bariatric counselor' (-6.0, pos 9.8) — tighten title/H1/intro and add internal links from the relevant blog posts.

Defend the core local #1-#3 cluster (bariatric surgery counseling SA, bariatric counseling SA, weight loss counseling SA, weight management therapist SA) — keep those pages fresh and internally linked; these are the highest-value owned positions.
Add/verify FAQ schema on the primary service pages for rich-result and AI-overview eligibility (FAQPage emits site-wide via the bcc-faq-schema plugin once a FAQ block is present).
If a staging->prod publish backlog is in play, confirm the real push list via a staging-vs-prod sitemap diff or Daniel's own notes — do not infer a count from GSC/keyword data.
summary: Core San Antonio money terms are holding their #1-#3 positions and the blog is generating the bulk of impressions (3 posts at 590-870 impr near page 1), but overall impressions and avg position have drifted down across the 7-week window and CTR is ~0.3%, so the priority is tracker hygiene on 6 stale staging URLs plus internal-linking/CTA work to convert existing visibility into clicks. Coverage figures are keyword counts (24 of 75 tracked keywords have data), not page counts; competitor and AI-visibility sections remain manual.
